name: Toggled
description: Toggled — Lightweight feature flag service with a simple REST API and React SDK for boolean toggles.

seo.title: Toggled — Feature Flags / Remote Config
seo.meta_description: Toggled: Toggled — Lightweight feature flag service with a simple REST API and React SDK for boolean toggles.

when_to_use: Lightweight boolean feature flag service with REST API
React SDK for client-side flag evaluation
Simple flag management for small team feature releases
Kill switch deployment with zero-config flag service

pros: Simple REST API and React SDK for boolean flags
review.verdict: Fine for a small React app that just needs on/off flags; outgrow it once you need real experimentation.
review.best_for: Small React/Node apps needing basic feature toggles fast
review.not_for: Teams needing advanced targeting, experiments or governance

developer_experience.reason: Basic REST API and React SDK
